title: Minisland Red Apple Cocktail Picks, 5 Inch Long Bamboo Fancy Toothpicks for Appetizers, Decorative Fall Halloween Thanksgiving Holiday Party Food Drinks Garnish Fruit Skewer Sticks 100 Counts -MSL422
features: SPECIFICATIONS: These cocktail toothpicks consist of bamboo sticks and wood apple decoration heads. The total stick is 5 inches long and 4.3 inches usable; Diameter 0.078 inch thick body; The head is about 0.59 inch long. 100 counts per bag

STURDY AND DURABLE: Thicker and twice longer than regular wooden toothpicks, these bamboo toothpicks are strong enough and easy to skewer or hold up all kinds of finger food like appetizers, fruits, sandwiches, cheeses, charcuteries, desserts etc.

VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: Beautiful and functional, these cute apple toothpicks are perfect for food serving and decorations in parties and many occasions, such as catering events, cocktails, weddings, birthdays etc. in daily life or on holidays

HIGH QUALITY RAW MATERIAL: We use fresh, high density and toughness bamboo to make these food picks. After grinding and high temperature fumigation, our bamboo picks are smoothly neat, burrs-free and safe for food skewering

NOTICE FOR HANDMADE PRODUCTS: Our appetizer picks were exquisitely made and selected by workers to make sure they were in perfect condition. But after thousands of miles of multiple overseas shipments, it's normal a few stick heads might fall off
description: SPECIFICATIONS: Type: Cocktail Picks Material: Bamboo Features: Food serving & decoration kitchen gadgets, Disposable, Environmental Size: 13 cm/5" long; Dia.2 mm/0.078" thick Weight: 60g Package: Opp bag; 1 bag 100 counts FUNCTIONS: Bamboo cocktail toothpicks are sturdy and durable, able to easily pierce through food without breaking or splintering. So, they are a versatile and eco-friendly option for serving small food bites, appetizers, drinks, fruits, kabobs, veggies, charcuterie, cheeses, desserts, snacks, sandwiches, sliders, cupcakes, antipastos, chocolate fountains, hors d'oeuvres etc. APPLICATION SCENARIOS : These appetizer picks are glued with decorated apple heads on the top end. The colorful fruit apple shape design adds a lovely touch to any presentation. And they match in harmony with variety of food display wares, such as glasses, cups, cones, bowls, boards, trays, platters, plates, stands etc. Apple is one of the most common fruits in our lives. It's especially a symbol for the Autumn harvest season. Beautiful and functional, these apple toothpicks can be used to decorate food and drinks in many occasions, Such as buffets, banquets, catering events, social gatherings, themed parties like Autumn foliage, wedding, engagement, bachelorette, bridal shower hosting, baby shower, birthday, graduation, back to school, anniversary, celebration, reception, mimosa bar, brunch, ladies'tea, cookout etc. Suitable for both daily life and also holidays or festivals, typically good for Halloween, Thanksgiving Day and Christmas etc. NOTICE AND GUARANTEE: 1. Bamboo toothpicks are sharp. Children should use them with adults' guardianship. 2. Recommend you to put them in clean, cool and dry places. 3. Full refund is guaranteed for any quality problems or damage caused by transit.
